title: SotoMoto's Allround Modpack
description: You want to have a Modpack with Magic, Tech, Adventuring and much more? Search no further, as this Modpack contains it all! The possibilitys may not be endless, but enough for  several hours of gameplay!
body:
This Modpack wants to offer different kind of playstyles for all kinds of players.

You want to build a huge, complicated Structure? Go wild with Mekanism, Create or other Tech-Mods!

Wanna be a Wizard or Witch? You can go with Ars Nouveau or go a bit darker with Blood Magic. Or you combine Tech and Magic with Botania.

You want to explore the world? There are multiple kinds of Dungeons thanks to When Dungeons Arise and Dungeon Crawl! And there are still more possibilitys to explore.

It may not be endless, but it is enough for several hours of Gameplay!

Plus, if you want to play with your friends, we also include the Simple Voice Chat, so you can easily chat with your friends ingame!

Credits for some of the mods used in this Modpack:

Macaw's Bridges: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-bridges

Macaw's Doors: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-doors

Macaw's Trapdoors: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-trapdoors

Macaw's Windows: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-windows

Blood Magic: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blood-magic
